attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.AP_DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUMBER,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.ASSET_ID,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.ASSET_INVOICE_ID,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.ATTRIBUTE1,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.ATTRIBUTE10,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.ATTRIBUTE11,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.ATTRIBUTE12,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.ATTRIBUTE13,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.ATTRIBUTE14,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.ATTRIBUTE15,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.ATTRIBUTE2,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.ATTRIBUTE3,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.ATTRIBUTE4,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.ATTRIBUTE5,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.ATTRIBUTE6,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.ATTRIBUTE7,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.ATTRIBUTE8,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.ATTRIBUTE9,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY_CODE,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.CREATED_BY,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.CREATE_BATCH_DATE,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.CREATE_BATCH_ID,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.CREATION_DATE,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.DATE_EFFECTIVE,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.DATE_INEFFECTIVE,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.DELETED_FLAG,
replace(replace(replace(MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.DESCRIPTION,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ') ,chr(234),' ')DESCRIPTION,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.FEEDER_SYSTEM_NAME,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.FIXED_ASSETS_COST,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.GES_PK_ID,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.GLOBAL_NAME,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.INVOICE_DATE,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.INVOICE_ID,
replace(replace(replace(MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.INVOICE_NUMBER,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ') ,chr(234),' ')INVOICE_NUMBER,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.INVOICE_TRANSACTION_ID_IN,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.INVOICE_TRANSACTION_ID_OUT,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.MERGED_CODE,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.MERGE_PARENT_MASS_ADDITIONS_ID,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.PARENT_MASS_ADDITION_ID,
replace(replace(replace(MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.PAYABLES_BATCH_NAME,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ') ,chr(234),' ')PAYABLES_BATCH_NAME,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.PAYABLES_CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.PAYABLES_COST,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.PAYABLES_UNITS,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.POST_BATCH_ID,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.PO_NUMBER,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.PO_VENDOR_ID,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.PROJECT_ASSET_LINE_ID,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.PROJECT_ID,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.SOURCE_LINE_ID,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.SPLIT_CODE,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.SPLIT_MERGED_CODE,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.SPLIT_PARENT_MASS_ADDITIONS_ID,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.TASK_ID,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.UNREVALUED_COST ,
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION_ID 
FROM
MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES
WHERE MF_FA_ASSET_INVOICES.GES_UPDATE_DATE
>TO_DATE('$$LastExtractDate',
'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
